title: BEM-548.1 curator intake hardening
objective:
Run script:
"""
base = Path('governance/internal_contour/tests/bem548')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
reports = Path('governance/reports')
reports.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
proofs.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
protocols = Path('governance/protocols')
protocols.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state_path = Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')

schema = protocols/'CURATOR_INTAKE_SCHEMA_V2.md'
schema.write_text('# BEM-548.1 | Curator Intake Schema v2\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:52 (UTC+3)\n\n## Required fields\n| Field | Type | Rule |\n|---|---|---|\n| trace_id | string | unique, non-empty |\n| source | enum | gpt, claude, telegram |\n| task_type | enum | development, audit, hotfix |\n| title | string | non-empty |\n| objective | string | non-empty |\n| created_at | string | UTC+3 timestamp preferred |\n| blocker | null/object | null for accepted tasks |\n\n## Duplicate rule\nIf trace_id already exists in transport, curator must reject duplicate with blocker code `DUPLICATE_TRACE_ID`.\n\n## Invalid schema rule\nMissing/invalid fields produce blocker code `CURATOR_INTAKE_SCHEMA_INVALID`.\n\n## Source audit\nEvery accepted/rejected intake writes `curator_intake_validation` to `governance/transport/results.jsonl`.\n')

# collect existing trace ids in transport
existing = []
if transport.exists():
    for line in transport.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines():
        if not line.strip():
            continue
        try:
            rec = json.loads(line)
        except Exception:
            continue
        tid = rec.get('trace_id')
        if tid:
            existing.append(tid)

required = ['trace_id','source','task_type','title','objective','created_at']
source_ok = ['gpt','claude','telegram']
task_ok = ['development','audit','hotfix']

def validate(task):
    errors = []
    for field in required:
        if not task.get(field):
            errors.append('missing_' + field)
    if task.get('source') and task.get('source') not in source_ok:
        errors.append('invalid_source')
    if task.get('task_type') and task.get('task_type') not in task_ok:
        errors.append('invalid_task_type')
    if task.get('trace_id') in existing:
        errors.append('duplicate_trace_id')
    if errors:
        code = 'DUPLICATE_TRACE_ID' if 'duplicate_trace_id' in errors else 'CURATOR_INTAKE_SCHEMA_INVALID'
        return {'accepted':False,'blocker':{'code':code,'errors':errors}}
    return {'accepted':True,'blocker':None}

valid_task = {'trace_id':'bem548_1_valid_intake','source':'gpt','task_type':'development','title':'Valid curator intake','objective':'Validate schema v2 with accepted task.','created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:52 (UTC+3)','blocker':None}
invalid_task = {'trace_id':'','source':'bad_source','task_type':'unknown','title':'','objective':'','created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:52 (UTC+3)','blocker':None}
duplicate_task = dict(valid_task)
duplicate_task['trace_id'] = existing[0] if existing else 'bem548_1_valid_intake'

samples = [('valid', valid_task), ('invalid', invalid_task), ('duplicate', duplicate_task)]
results = []
for name, task in samples:
    result = validate(task)
    artifact = base/('curator_intake_' + name + '.json')
    artifact.write_text(json.dumps({'task':task,'validation':result}, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
    rec = {'record_type':'curator_intake_validation','cycle_id':'bem548-1-curator-intake-hardening','source':'curator','status':'accepted' if result['accepted'] else 'rejected','trace_id':task.get('trace_id'),'validation':result,'artifact_path':str(artifact),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':result['blocker'],'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:52 (UTC+3)'}
    with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(json.dumps(rec, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
    results.append(rec)

ok = results[0]['status'] == 'accepted' and results[1]['status'] == 'rejected' and results[2]['status'] == 'rejected'
state = json.loads(state_path.read_text(errors='ignore')) if state_path.exists() else {}
state['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 14:52 (UTC+3)'
state['curator_intake_schema_v2'] = {'status':'PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER','schema':'governance/protocols/CURATOR_INTAKE_SCHEMA_V2.md','validation_samples':[r['artifact_path'] for r in results]}
state['blocker'] = None if ok else {'code':'CURATOR_INTAKE_HARDENING_FAILED'}
state_path.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

report = reports/'bem548_1_curator_intake_hardening.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-548.1 | Curator Runtime Intake Hardening | ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + '\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:52 (UTC+3)\n\n## Checks\n| Sample | Expected | Actual | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| valid | accepted | ' + results[0]['status'] + ' | required fields valid |\n| invalid | rejected | ' + results[1]['status'] + ' | invalid source/task_type/missing fields |\n| duplicate | rejected | ' + results[2]['status'] + ' | duplicate trace_id protection |\n\n## Files\n- `governance/protocols/CURATOR_INTAKE_SCHEMA_V2.md`\n- `governance/internal_contour/tests/bem548/curator_intake_valid.json`\n- `governance/internal_contour/tests/bem548/curator_intake_invalid.json`\n- `governance/internal_contour/tests/bem548/curator_intake_duplicate.json`\n\n## Blocker\n' + ('null' if ok else 'CURATOR_INTAKE_HARDENING_FAILED') + '\n')
proof = proofs/'bem548_1_curator_intake_hardening.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-548.1 ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + ': curator intake schema v2 validation completed.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(schema), str(base/'curator_intake_valid.json'), str(base/'curator_intake_invalid.json'), str(base/'curator_intake_duplicate.json'), str(transport), str(state_path), str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-548.1 curator intake schema v2 hardening completed')
"""
No issue comments.
